2604.26940.title: Select to Think: Unlocking SLM Potential with Local Sufficiency
2604.26940.paper_summary: Small language models (SLMs) offer computational efficiency for scalable deployment, yet they often fall short of the reasoning power exhibited by their larger counterparts (LLMs). To mitigate this gap, current approaches invoke an LLM to generate tokens at points of reasoning divergence, but these external calls introduce substantial latency and costs. Alternatively, standard distillation is often hindered by the capacity limitation, as SLMs struggle to accurately mimic the LLM's complex generative distribution. We address this dilemma by identifying local sufficiency: at divergence points, the LLM's preferred token consistently resides within the SLM's top-K next-token predictions, even when failing to emerge as the SLM top-1 choice. We therefore propose SELECT TO THINK (S2T), which reframes the LLM's role from open-ended generation to selection among the SLM's proposals, simplifying the supervision signal to discrete candidate rankings. Leveraging this, we introduce S2T-LOCAL, which distills the selection logic into the SLM, empowering it to perform autonomous re-ranking without inference-time LLM dependency. Empirically, we demonstrate that a 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates capture the 32B LLM's choice with 95% hit rate. Translating this potential into performance, S2T-LOCAL improves greedy decoding by 24.1% on average across benchmarks, effectively matching the efficacy of 8-path self-consistency while operating with single-trajectory efficiency.
2604.26940.paper_summary_zh: 小型語言模型（SLMs）在可擴展部署方面提供了計算效率，但它們在推理能力上往往不及其較大的對應模型（LLMs）。為了減少這一差距，當前的方法在推理分歧點調用LLM生成標記，但這些外部調用會引入顯著的延遲和成本。另一方面，標準蒸餾常常受到容量限制的阻礙，因為SLMs難以準確模仿LLM的複雜生成分佈。我們通過識別局部充分性來解決這一困境：在分歧點，LLM的首選標記始終位於SLM的前K個下一標記預測中，即使它未能成為SLM的首選。我們因此提出了SELECT TO THINK（S2T），這將LLM的角色從開放式生成重新構建為在SLM的提議中進行選擇，簡化了監督信號為離散候選排名。利用這一點，我們引入了S2T-LOCAL，將選擇邏輯蒸餾到SLM中，使其能夠在不依賴推理時LLM的情況下進行自主重新排序。在實證上，我們證明了一個15億參數的SLM的前8個候選項以95%的命中率捕捉了320億參數LLM的選擇。將這一潛力轉化為性能，S2T-LOCAL在各基準測試中平均提高了24.1%的貪婪解碼效果，有效匹配了8路自一致性的效能，同時以單一軌跡的效率運行。
2604.26940.author: Wenxuan Ye et.al.
2604.26940.authors: Wenxuan Ye, Yangyang Zhang, Xueli An, Georg Carle, Yunpu Ma
